title: Implement Telemetry Data Contracts And Runner Capture
description: Extend execution result models and runner plumbing to capture raw prompt/response artifacts, token usage source data, and prompt size diagnostics needed for attempt telemetry records.
acceptance_criteria: `AgentRunResult` (and related model structures) supports raw response text, parsed payload, token usage, error metadata, and timing fields required by telemetry v1.
Runner returns enough data for telemetry persistence on success, blocked, and failed paths.
Token usage source precedence contract (`provider` -> `estimated` -> `unknown`) is implemented or stubbed deterministically for current runner integration.
